steps.title: Read line k's slope
steps.content: Line $k$ is $y=4x+20$, which is in slope-intercept form. The slope of line $k$ is the coefficient of $x$, so $m=4$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular slope shortcut
steps.content: Perpendicular lines have slopes that are opposite reciprocals. The opposite reciprocal of $4$ is $$-\frac{1}{4}$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A (‘$-\frac{1}{4}$’) is $-\frac{1}{4}$, so it is correct. The other choices use unrelated denominators from the equation instead of the reciprocal of the slope.
